name: Gigiri
text: The diplomatic quarter. Minutes from the UN complex, the US Embassy and the International School of Kenya — most staff here never drive to work.

name: Runda
text: Managed compounds with shared pools and playgrounds, built for families on multi-year postings. The default first-posting answer.

name: Karen
text: Acre plots, horses and forest air. You trade the commute for room to breathe — and for Brookhouse and Hillcrest on your doorstep.

name: Westlands
text: Serviced apartments above the malls and offices. Six-month leases, no garden to manage — the short-assignment choice.

name: Lavington
text: Leafy, walkable and central, with townhouses that suit families who want the city rather than a compound.

name: Kilimani
text: Apartments with pools and gyms, walking distance to Yaya Centre and the shortest run to Upper Hill and the city centre.
